title: Life is Strange - Episode 5 - Reversed Backwards School Scene
description:
-- SPOILER ALERT -- This is near the end of Episode 5, I would not recommend watching it before finishing the game.

I've un-reversed the reversed gameplay scene in "Life is Strange" to see how well it'll represent the first scene in-game. Kinda, I guess, but not quite...
Anyways, just for fun!
